description_long: This ornate plant pot features a wide, circular basin with a thick, decorative rim adorned in a faded pinkish hue and subtle floral motifs. The pot is supported by a sturdy, square pedestal base and has a bulbous, dark midsection with sculpted reliefs resembling classical garlands or acanthus leaves. Two large, elaborate handles extend from either side, each intricately curled and detailed, giving the pot a baroque or neoclassical appearance. The handles are a lighter, weathered stone color, contrasting with the darker body and rim. The interior is deep and spacious, suitable for holding soil and a medium-sized plant. The overall finish is aged, suggesting it is made from stone or ceramic, and it would be a striking feature in a formal garden or urban park.
description: An ornate, classical-style plant pot with a wide basin, decorative rim, and large, curled handles, finished in aged stone tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing both elaborate curled handles and the full decorative rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the rim and the profile of one handle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with both handles visible and the pedestal base prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the other handle and the depth of the basin.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used as a decorative centerpiece in formal gardens or public plazas
